audit_items.proof_trace: The `else if (isPriceValid)` guard at line 255 is the sole code path into `eligibleAssets`; assets with `isPriceValid == false` cannot reach line 264 and are skipped. A secondary post-loop guard (lines 271-273) resets `eligibleAssetsIdx` to zero if the assetOut price is also invalid. `performUpkeep` enforces a tertiary check via `_getAssetPrice(asset, true)` (withValidation=true) which reverts on stale/zero price.
